manifest.author: Trung Tran
manifest.name: Current File Tags
manifest.description: Display the active Markdown file's tags and associated files.

manifest.author: Pamela Wang
manifest.name: Current Folder Notes
manifest.description: Shows a list of notes in the current folder, and allows you to filter the titles to include or exclude notes.

manifest.author: Lucas Ostmann
manifest.name: Current View
manifest.description: Automatically set the view mode (Reading, Live Preview, Source) for notes using folder rules, file patterns, or frontmatter.

manifest.author: Adam Cloud
manifest.name: Cursor Bridge
manifest.description: Seamlessly bridge your notes with Cursor, the AI-powered code editor. Open notes directly in Cursor to enhance your workflow.

manifest.author: Xuer
manifest.name: cursor-goaway
manifest.description: make cursor goaway after open a text file

manifest.author: Sangwon Jung
manifest.name: Cursor Jump
manifest.description: Quickly jump between list items and headings throughout same or upper/lower level

manifest.author: Florian Gubler
manifest.name: Cursor Position History
manifest.description: Remember the previous positions of the cursor across files: auto-scroll to the correct position in a new file. Navigate backward and forward through your cursor position history without losing context.

manifest.author: Por Chainarong Tangsurakit
manifest.name: Cursor Position on Title Enter
manifest.description: Set the cursor position after pressing Enter on the note title.

manifest.author: Lila Rest <mail@lila.rest>
manifest.name: Custom Classes
manifest.description: Custom Classes is a minimalist plugin that allows you to add custom HTML classes to markdown blocks

manifest.author: Staaaaaaaaaan
manifest.name: Custom Commands
manifest.description: Create custom commands to be executed in the command palette, and by hotkey. Currently supports opening specific notes, creating notes, inserting snippets, and executing sequences of commands.

manifest.author: Jack Chronicle
manifest.name: Custom Comments
manifest.description: Adds a method to create custom keyboard shortcuts that enclose comments.

manifest.author: peabody28
manifest.name: Custom File Viewer
manifest.description: Open files with custom external applications based on file extension

manifest.author: Amir Pourmand
manifest.name: Custom Font Loader
manifest.description: Customize your Obsidian vault with any font you want (+ Support for Android and IOS)

manifest.author: HaierKeys
manifest.name: Custom Image Auto Uploader
manifest.description: You can batch download images from your notes on desktop, iOS, and Android platforms, and batch upload and save them to a remote server, home NAS, or cloud storage (such as Alibaba Cloud OSS, Amazon S3, Cloudflare R2, MinIO). Additionally, you can stretch, crop, and resize the images.

manifest.author: Lilian POULIQUEN
manifest.name: Custom list character
manifest.description: Adds the ability to choose the character to use when creating a bullet list between '-', '*' and '+'

manifest.author: homu-konamilk
manifest.name: Custom new file name
manifest.description: Enables the creation of new notes with custom formatted names, including dynamic datetime stamps.

manifest.author: jackvonhouse
manifest.name: Custom Node Size
manifest.description: Customize nodes size for improved graph understanding.

manifest.author: 0skater0
manifest.name: Custom Note Width
manifest.description: Let's you adjust the line width on a note-by-note basis.

manifest.author: HananoshikaYomaru
manifest.name: Custom save
manifest.description: Run any commands when you save a file in the editor

manifest.author: banisterious
manifest.name: Custom Selected Word Count
manifest.description: Comprehensive text analysis for selected text including word counting, character counting, and sentence counting with modern UI design.

manifest.author: RavenHogWarts
manifest.name: Custom Icons
manifest.description: Enhance your workspace with customizable icons for documents and folders.

manifest.author: David V. Kimball
manifest.name: Custom Slides
manifest.description: Customizes the Slides core plugin navigation, styles, and behavior.

manifest.author: SebastianMC
manifest.name: Custom File Explorer sorting
manifest.description: Allows for manual and automatic, config-driven reordering and sorting of files and folders in File Explorer

manifest.author: Okami Wong
manifest.name: Custom State for Task List
manifest.description: Add custom states to task list items.

manifest.author: Outsiders17711
manifest.name: Custom Syntax Highlights
manifest.description: Display files with custom extensions as syntax-highlighted code blocks in reading view with configurable extension-to-language mappings.

manifest.author: @gapmiss
manifest.name: Custom Theme Studio
manifest.description: Create and customize themes with a built-in CSS editor. Modify colors, styles, and export your custom theme.

manifest.author: kzhovn
manifest.name: Customizable Menu
manifest.description: Allows you to add any command to Obsidian's right-click menu.

manifest.description: This a plugin provides hotkeys to cycle through tabs in the left or right sidebars.
